title: Silly Willy Core
description: This mod is the core mod for the silly willies modpack
body:
# Silly Willy Core

## Full Revamp in progress (Remaking the mod from scratch) 
### 0.1 Release expected in 2026
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### This mod is the core mod to the Silly Willies modpack
---------------------------------------------------------


In the Geometry Dimension you'll encounter fragmented world gen, the new altar structure, and the new Triangulum Ore.

![Random 3d shapes in Geo Dimension with some of the ground showing at the bottom ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cefdd313e820ed9e1ba66b0caff2d1e728c89d2.png)

![Shows netherite armor with every trim from Minecraft 1.21.1 using the Triangulum trim material](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae205dd608b67d8cdb2801d655d565ddfe92df5a.png)

With the new Triangulum Tools mine the new Entangulum ore and refine it into the Entangulum spool to make the new Comfy bed (features in this paragraph are all still in dev/idea hell and will probably be changed)

> This has been worked on by Crit(Programmer), Zomagon(Artist and concepts), and P.(Programmer and ideas)
